## Protocol Notes

- Prefer a narrow GitHub Actions proof path over a broad local build loop when both can prove the same point.
- Keep local builds short and scoped for sanity checks, blocker isolation, and minimal repros.
- When used in a structured AI handoff, prefer fixed fields such as `Status`, `Decision`, `Next Action`, and `Stop Reason`.
